en: Now the LORD spoke to Moses and to Aaron, saying,
zh: 耶和華對摩西和亞倫說：

en: "This is the statute of the law that the LORD has commanded: Tell the people of Israel to bring you a red heifer without defect, in which there is no blemish, and on which a yoke has never come.
zh: “耶和華所定的律法的條例是這樣說：你要吩咐以色列人，把一頭完全、沒有殘疾、未曾負過軛的紅母牛，牽到你這裡來。

en: And you shall give it to Eleazar the priest, and it shall be taken outside the camp and slaughtered before him.
zh: 你們要把牛交給以利亞撒祭司，他就要把牛牽到營外，在他面前把牛宰了。

en: And Eleazar the priest shall take some of its blood with his finger, and sprinkle some of its blood toward the front of the tent of meeting seven times.
zh: 以利亞撒祭司要用指頭蘸牛血，向會幕前面灑七次。

en: And the heifer shall be burned in his sight. Its skin, its flesh, and its blood, with its dung, shall be burned.
zh: 然後，在他面前把牛焚燒，牛的皮、肉、血和糞，都要焚燒。

en: And the priest shall take cedarwood and hyssop and scarlet yarn, and throw them into the fire burning the heifer.
zh: 祭司要把香柏木、牛膝草、朱紅色線，都丟在燒牛的火中。

en: Then the priest shall wash his clothes and bathe his body in water, and afterward he may come into the camp. But the priest shall be unclean until evening.
zh: 祭司要洗自己的衣服，並用水洗身，然後才可以進營；但祭司必不潔淨到晚上。

en: The one who burns the heifer shall wash his clothes in water and bathe his body in water and shall be unclean until evening.
zh: 那燒牛的人也要用水洗自己的衣服，並用水洗身，也必不潔淨到晚上。

en: And a man who is clean shall gather up the ashes of the heifer and deposit them outside the camp in a clean place. And they shall be kept for the water for impurity for the congregation of the people of Israel; it is a sin offering.
zh: 要由一個潔淨的人收起母牛的灰，安放在營外潔淨的地方，為以色列會眾留作除污穢的水，這是除罪的。

en: And the one who gathers the ashes of the heifer shall wash his clothes and be unclean until evening. And this shall be a perpetual statute for the people of Israel, and for the stranger who sojourns among them.
zh: 那收起牛灰的人，要洗自己的衣服，必不潔淨到晚上。這要給以色列人和寄居在他們中間的外人，作永遠的定例。

en: "Whoever touches the dead body of any person shall be unclean seven days.
zh: “摸了任何人類屍體的，必不潔淨七天。

en: He shall cleanse himself with the water on the third day and on the seventh day, and so be clean. But if he does not cleanse himself on the third day and on the seventh day, he will not become clean.
zh: 那人在第三天要用這樣除污穢的水潔淨自己，到第七天他就潔淨了；如果他在第三天不潔淨自己，到第七天他就不潔淨了。

en: Whoever touches a dead person, the body of anyone who has died, and does not cleanse himself, defiles the tabernacle of the LORD, and that person shall be cut off from Israel; because the water for impurity was not thrown on him, he shall be unclean. His uncleanness is still on him.
zh: 任何人摸了死人、死人的屍體，而不潔淨自己的，就玷污了耶和華的帳幕，這人必要從以色列中剪除，因為這除污穢的水沒有灑在他身上，所以他必不潔淨；他的不潔還留在他身上。

en: "This is the law when someone dies in a tent: everyone who comes into the tent and everyone who is in the tent shall be unclean seven days.
zh: “如果人在會幕裡死了，條例是這樣的：進這會幕的和一切在會幕裡的，都必不潔淨七天。

en: And every open vessel that has no cover fastened on it is unclean.
zh: 一切敞口的器皿，就是沒有蓋上蓋的，都是不潔淨的。

en: Whoever in the open field touches someone who was killed with a sword or who died naturally, or touches a human bone or a grave, shall be unclean seven days.
zh: 在田間摸了被刀殺死的，或是自己死的屍體，或是人的骨頭，或是墳墓，就必不潔淨七天。

en: For the unclean they shall take some ashes of the burnt sin offering, and fresh water shall be added in a vessel.
zh: 人要為這不潔淨的人，拿些燒成的除罪灰，放在器皿裡，倒上活水。

en: Then a clean person shall take hyssop and dip it in the water and sprinkle it on the tent and on all the furnishings and on the persons who were there and on whoever touched the bone, or the slain or the dead or the grave.
zh: 要由一個潔淨的人，拿牛膝草蘸在這水裡，把水灑在會幕上和一切器皿，以及在那裡的眾人身上，又灑在摸了骨頭，或是摸了被殺死的，或是摸了自己死去的，或是摸了墳墓的人身上。

en: And the clean person shall sprinkle it on the unclean on the third day and on the seventh day. Thus on the seventh day he shall cleanse him, and he shall wash his clothes and bathe himself in water, and at evening he shall be clean.
zh: 第三天和第七天，那潔淨的人要灑水在不潔淨的人身上，這樣到第七天就使他潔淨；他要洗自己的衣服，用水洗身，到晚上就潔淨了。

en: "If the man who is unclean does not cleanse himself, that person shall be cut off from the midst of the assembly, since he has defiled the sanctuary of the LORD. Because the water for impurity has not been thrown on him, he is unclean.
zh: “但那污穢而不潔淨自己的，那人必從會眾中被剪除，因為他玷污了耶和華的聖所；除污穢的水沒有灑在他身上，他是不潔淨的。

en: And it shall be a statute forever for them. The one who sprinkles the water for impurity shall wash his clothes, and the one who touches the water for impurity shall be unclean until evening.
zh: 這要給你們作永遠的定例。那灑了除污穢水的人，要洗自己的衣服；那摸了除污穢水的，必不潔淨到晚上。

en: And whatever the unclean person touches shall be unclean, and anyone who touches it shall be unclean until evening."
zh: 不潔淨的人摸過的一切，必不潔淨；摸了這物的人，也必不潔淨到晚上。”
